title: Dynamic Contrast Enhanced Magnetic Resonance Imaging Protocol
author: John Rutledge
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yh9ft96
materials: Transport the mice to the NMR facility
The baseline measurement will automatically begin
Let the macro run its course.

steps.title: Animal Preparation
steps.instruction: Animal Preparation: 1. Prior to DCE-MRI, the animal should have been through the Femoral Vein Cannulation protocol.

steps.title: Turn off main power source to...
steps.instruction: Turn off main power source to the 7T and the water circulator.

steps.title: Disconnect the power cables and water...
steps.instruction: Disconnect the power cables and water circulator from the standard gradient to the 7T.

steps.title: Carefully carry the microgradient to the...
steps.instruction: Carefully carry the microgradient to the 7T and insert into the bore. (The microgradient weighs about 40 pounds!)

steps.title: Connect the power cables and water...
steps.instruction: Connect the power cables and water circulator from the microgradient to the 7T. Make sure the isocenter of the microgradient is in the proper place using the ruler measurement. (Distance will be posted at the front of the bore).

steps.title: Turn main power and water circulator back on
steps.instruction: Turn main power and water circulator back on.

steps.title: Connect the proper tubing for the...
steps.instruction: Connect the proper tubing for the circulating water heater to keep animal temperature. Make sure distilled water is filled passed the indicated mark. Thread the tubing through the animal stage and tape it in place.

steps.title: Place the animal stage on the...
steps.instruction: Place the animal stage on the 7T stage and tape that into place. Turn on the water heater to warmup.

steps.title: Place the animal in the supine...
steps.instruction: Place the animal in the supine position at the tip of the animal stage. Insert the bite bar into the mouth of the animal.

steps.title: Make sure the head is straight...
steps.instruction: Make sure the head is straight and taught from the body. Tape the bite bar and head in place. Place the circulating water heater on the abdomen of the animal.

steps.title: Insert the animal into the microgradient...
steps.instruction: Insert the animal into the microgradient making sure that the stage does not touch the microgradient. Make sure no limbs and tail of the animal is hanging out.

steps.title: The tubing from the cannula should...
steps.instruction: The tubing from the cannula should be long enough to come out of the bore and is still accessible to the person.

steps.title: The head of the animal should...
steps.instruction: The head of the animal should be at the isocenter of the microgradient.

steps.title: Open the Paravision 5 program
steps.instruction: Open the Paravision 5 program.

steps.title: Click on file > new >...
steps.instruction: Click on file > new > set-up information for your subject.

steps.title: Click on the wrench icon to open the “Tools” window
steps.instruction: Click on the wrench icon to open the “Tools” window.

steps.title: Load protocol from the “Anderson” file folder
steps.instruction: Load protocol from the “Anderson” file folder.

steps.title: Know your imaging parameters beforehand (i
steps.instruction: Know your imaging parameters beforehand (i.e voxel size 32mmx32mmx1mm) to ensure all images have the same parameters and make adjustments prior to running the protocol.

steps.title: Run Protocol 1 = One Pulse
steps.instruction: Run Protocol 1 = One Pulse

steps.title: Run Protocol 2 = RARE_VTR Tripilot a
steps.instruction: Run Protocol 2 = RARE_VTR Tripilot a. Using the measurement tool, make sure that the sulcus of the brain is 5mm from the isocenter. Make any adjustments necessary to ensure the animal is in the proper place.

steps.title: Repeat step 6 until animal is in proper place
steps.instruction: Repeat step 6 until animal is in proper place

steps.title: Run Protocol 3 = MSME
steps.instruction: Run Protocol 3 = MSME

steps.title: Run Protocol 4 = Perfpack060314
steps.instruction: Run Protocol 4 = Perfpack060314

steps.title: Run Protocol 5 = RARE_VTR_micro
steps.instruction: Run Protocol 5 = RARE_VTR_micro

steps.title: Set-up macro
steps.instruction: Set-up macro: a. Click on the black hat to open the “macro” screen b. Scroll until you find the Scan N protocol (make sure N=

steps.title: c
steps.instruction: c. Clone Protocol 5 ten times d. Make sure mouse cursor is at the first scan (scan

steps.title: A syringe with Magnevist (diluted or...
steps.instruction: A syringe with Magnevist (diluted or undiluted in saline depending on the weight of your animal to be able to measure the proper amount you can accurately infuse into the animal) should be hooked up to the cannula. The Magnevist concentration should be injected at 0.5ml/kg.

steps.title: Once the baseline measurement is at...
steps.instruction: Once the baseline measurement is at 80%, count 8 “clicks” and then start the infusion follow by a flush of saline at the same volume.

steps.title: Run protocol 17 = MSME
steps.instruction: Run protocol 17 = MSME

steps.title: Run protocol 18 = Perfpack060314
steps.instruction: Run protocol 18 = Perfpack060314

steps.title: All data will be saved onto the hard drive
steps.instruction: All data will be saved onto the hard drive.

steps.title: Upload data onto the Kona server...
steps.instruction: Upload data onto the Kona server to ensure that the data is safely stored.
